title: Mystery Solved: Angkor Wat Temple's Sandstones Transported Via Network of Canals
highlights: decades, archaeologists have wondered how the sandstones were transported to the temple from quarries located at the base of a nearby sacred mountain known as Mount Kulen. Researcher Uchida and her colleagues studied satellite images and found a network of canals and roads linking the quarries to the temple site.
